title: Draw 3-D Frame Outside (DrawOutside)
text: Draw 3-D Frame Outside (DrawOutside) This property determines whether a 3-D frame is drawn outside the widget area. DrawOutside=True | False (default) Description Setting Draw 3-D Frame Outside to false prevents the widget from overlapping adjacent fields. For example, on Windows 11, with the form's Cell Height set to 110, setting Draw Outside to true can obscure the border of the field that has focus: DrawOutside=False DrawOutside=True It is a static property and cannot be changed in ProcScript. Usage Dynamic? No Dependencies: Applicable only if 3-D is true . Applies To ueditbox (EditBox) ucombobox (Combo Box) udropdownlist (DropDownList) uoutputbox (OutputBox) urtfeditbox (RichEditBox) uspinbutton (SpinButton) Related Links 3-D Effect (3d) This property determines whether a three-dimensional appearance is applied when the widget is displayed. True (default) or False. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
